description: Real-time Quran recitation recognition — Arabic, transliteration, and translation on smart glasses.

permissions.description: Listen to live recitation for verse matching

settings.label: Mode
settings.description: Taraweeh follows the imam with auto-advance timer. Practice snaps display to each heard verse.

settings.label: Surah hint (1–114, or 0)
settings.description: Optional surah number to speed up initial lock. Use 0 for auto-detect any surah.

settings.label: Fast recitor
settings.description: Shorter display timers for quick recitation (Taraweeh mode).

settings.label: Slow recitor
settings.description: Longer display timers for measured recitation (Taraweeh mode).

settings.label: API key mode
settings.description: Shared uses server keys from your .env. BYOK uses your personal Groq/OpenAI key below.

settings.label: BYOK provider
settings.description: Only used when API key mode is BYOK.

settings.label: Groq API key
settings.description: gsk_… — only used in BYOK mode with Groq provider.

settings.label: OpenAI API key
settings.description: sk-… — only used in BYOK mode with OpenAI provider.
